q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: «هَذَا هُوَ جَدُّ جِيمٍ، السَّيِّدُ …» وَذَكَرَتِ اسْمَ السَّي

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: لَمْ يُحِبَّ جَدُّ هايدي الطَّرِيقَةَ الَّتِي تَحَدَّثَتْ بِهَا ديتا مَعَهُ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَامَ الْجَدُّ مِنْ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: أَعْطَاهُ السَّيِّدُ سِيسْمَانُ رِسَالَةً إِلَىٰ جَدِّ هَايْدِي يَشْرَحُ فِيهَا

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَالَ الْجَدُّ بِصَوْتٍ حَزِينٍ: «وَمَاذَا لَوْ نَسِينَاهُ بِالْفِعْلِ؟»

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: شَرَحَتْ كِلَارَا كَيْفَ عَمِلَ الْجَدُّ مَعَهَا فِي الْأَسَابِيعِ السَّابِقَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَالَ الْجَدُّ ضِفْدِعٌ: «أُوهْ، أَنَا أَعْلَمُ مَا هِيَ.»

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الْجَدُّ قَصَصاً مُمْتِعَةً عَنِ الْحَرْبِ وَالنَّاسُ اسْتَمَعُوا بِاهْتِم

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الجَدُّ حِكَايَةً عَنْ طُفُولَتِهِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: سَافَرَ الْجَدُّ وَأَخَذَ جَاكِيتاً.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الْجَدُّ قِصَّةً مُفْعَمَةً بِالْحِكْمَةِ لِلْأَطْفَالِ فِي الْمَسَاءِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الْجَدُّ قِصَّةً مُؤَثِّرَةً لِلْأَطْفَالِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الجَدُّ قِصَّةً عَنْ مَمَرٍّ طَوِيلٍ فِي البَيْتِ القَدِيمِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: وَرَّثَ الجَدُّ أَحْفَادَهُ البَيْتَ القَدِيمَ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الْجَدُّ قِصَّةً عَنِ الْحَرْبِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الجَدُّ حِكَايَةً عَنِ الشَّرِّ وَالخَيْرِ لِلْأَطْفَالِ قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: الجَدُّ يَلْبَسُ جَلَّابِيَّةً بَيْضَاءَ وَوَدَّعَ أَحْفَادَهُ عِنْدَ المَطَارِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: عُمْرُ الْجَدِّ سَبْعُونَ سَنَةً.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الْجَدُّ حِكَايَةً عَنْ قَبِيلَتِهِ الشُّجَاعَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: كَانَ هُنَاكَ الْعَدِيدُ مِنَ الْوُجُوهِ الْجَدِيدَةِ حَتَّى إِنَّ الْجَدَّ لَمْ

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: الجَدُّ غَائِبٌ مُنْذُ سَنَوَاتٍ كَثِيرَةٍ، لَكِنَّ أَشْيَاءَهُ لَا تَزَالُ هُنَ

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الجَدُّ قِصَّةً عَنْ حَرَقِ البَيْتِ القَدِيمِ فِي الشِّتَاءِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَوَى الجَدُّ قِصَّةً مُمْتِعَةً عَنِ الأَخَوَاتِ الثَّلَاثِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: شَادَ الجَدُّ بَيْتاً صَغِيراً فِي القَرْيَةِ قَبْلَ سِنِينَ كَثِيرَةٍ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: لَكِنَّ الجَدَّ تَوَفَّى، فَآجَرَ أَبِي البَيْتَ لِسَائِحٍ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: عُمْرُ الجَدِّ سِتُّونَ سَنَةً.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2549

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: أَبُو بَكْرٍ صَامَ رَمَضَانَ كُلَّهُ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: بَكْرٌ اِلْتَحَقَ بِقِسْمِ التَّصْوِيرِ، فَازْدَادَتْ فَطْنَتُهُ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: أَشَارَ بَكْرٌ وَسَطَ العَتْمَةِ، فَاطْمَأَنَّ وَحِيدٌ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: بَكْرٌ عَرَفَ نِسْبَةَ الزِّنْكِ بَعْدَ نِقَاشٍ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: اِسْتَغْرَبَ بَكْرٌ إِذْ مَسَّ الشِّيشَ المُتَّقِدَ، فَأَخْفَضَ يَدَهُ وَتَمَلْم

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَفَعَ بَكْرٌ سَبَّابَتَهُ، وَهَتَفَ: يَلّا!

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: رَفَعَ بَكْرٌ شِبْرًا، فَاسْتَوَى الحَدُّ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: اعْتَزَّ بَكْرٌ بِفِطْنَتِهِ أَثْنَاءَ المُنَاقَشَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: اشْتَرَى بَكْرٌ نَفْسَ الكَامِيرَا الَّتِي اخْتَبَرَهَا أَمْسِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَضَى بَكْرٌ زَمَنًا طَوِيلًا بِالمَزْرَعَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: اشْتَرَى بَكْرٌ سَمَكَ التُّنِّ مِنَ البَلْدَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#2703
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: أَوْقَدَ بَكْرٌ النَّارَ حَتَّى صَارَتْ جَمْرًا.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدِمَ سُرُورٌ لِأَحْمَدَ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمُ مُحَمَّدٍ صَغِيرَةٌ جِدّاً.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: هَلْ قَدَمُ كَلْبِكَ بَيْضاءُ؟

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمُ الْوَلَدِ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: إِلَى فِلَسْطِينٍ قَدَّمَ فِلَسْطِينِيٌّ الدَّوْلَةَ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَّمَ طِفْلٌ إِلَى السَّيَّارَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَّمَ جَدِّي إِلَى الْقَرْيَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: اِبْنِي قَدَّمَ رِسَالَةً إِلَى الأُسْتَاذَةِ فِي الشَّهْرِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: فِي أُوسْلُو قَدَمَ طَالِبٌ إِلَى وَرْشَةٍ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ المُهَنْدِسُ إِلَى القَرْيَةِ، فَكانَ عِنْدَهُ نُورٌ وَشَمْسٌ فِي الأَرْض

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ الطَّالِبُ الْجَدِيدُ إِلَى مَدْرَسَةِ التَّحْرِيرِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: هَلْ قَدَمَ السَّائِقُ بِالْبَاصِ إِلَى الْمَطَارِ؟

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ الطَّالِبُ إِلَى مَدِينَةِ أُوسْلُو فِي شَهْرِ شُبَاطَ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ الطَّالِبُ الثَّانِي إِلَى الصَّفِّ الْآنَ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ النَّمِرُ السَّرِيعُ ثُمَّ دَبَّ الأَسَدُ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَّمَ الْوَلَدُ الْكُرَةَ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ الأَرْنَبُ وَالغَزَالُ نَفْسَ الرَّأْيِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: فِي يَوْمِ السَّبْتِ، يَلْعَبُ الأَوْلَادُ كُرَةَ القَدَمِ فِي الحَدِيقَةِ بِسُر

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: فِي الثَّانَوِيَّةِ يَلْعَبُ الطُّلَّابُ كُرَةَ القَدَمِ فِي فَتْرَةِ الاِسْتِرَ

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: فِي الْمَطْعَمِ، قَدَّمَ النَّادِلُ سَلَطَةً وَبِيتْزَا، وَالْإِضَافَةُ الْأَخِي

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: فِي المَطْعَمِ، قَدَّمَ النَّادِلُ سَلَطَةً لَذِيذَةً مَعَ قِطَعٍ مِنَ التُّفَّا

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: هَلْ تُفَضِّلُ نَشَاطَ السِّبَاحَةِ أَمْ نَشَاطَ كُرَةِ القَدَمِ فِي وَقْتِ الفَ

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: صَدِيقِي الرُّوسِيُّ مُضْحِكٌ جِدًّا وَيَلْعَبُ كُرَةَ القَدَمِ كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: النَّادِلُ قَدَّمَ لَ هَا كَأْساً مِنَ القَهْوَةِ مَعَ قِطْعَةٍ مِنَ البَقْلَاوَ

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: أَنا أُحِبُّ مُدَرِّبَ كُرَةِ القَدَمِ كَثِيراً.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: الْأُسْتَاذُ قَدَّمَ دَرْسًا جَدِيدًا عَنِ الْأَدَبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَّمَ الطَّبَّاخُ عَشَاءً لَذِيذًا، ثُمَّ الْتَحَقَ بِالنَّادِي الرِّيَاضِيِّ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ الأُسْتَاذُ طَرِيقَةً جَدِيدَةً لِتَعَلُّمِ الأَدَبِ العَرَبِيِّ فَأَعْجَ

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَمَ المُمَثِّلُ السُّورِيُّ عَرْضاً مُثِيراً قَبْلَ بِدَايَةِ المُبَارَاةِ ال

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: قَدَّمَ لَهُ الزُّجَاجَةَ، وَقَالَ لَهُ: «اشْرَبْ يَا عَمِّي».

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: كَانَ كُلُّ وَاحِدٍ مِنَ الْأَطْفَالِ قَدْ قَدَّمَ بِالْفِعْلِ عِبَارَاتِ الشُّك

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3080

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: تَلَقَّطَتِ الفَتَاةُ أَوْرَاقَ الكَتَمِ وَطَحَنَتْهَا جَيِّداً.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3597
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: أَحْضَرَتْ حَفْنَةً مَطْحُونَةً مِنَ الكَتَمِ لِلتَّجْرِبَةِ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3597

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3597

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3927

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: فقال لَهُ «بابا عبدُ اللهِ»: «وأَنا ذاهِبٌ إِلى بَغْدادَ.»

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3927
q3_mismapped_sentence_words.arabic_text: فِي المَاضِي كانَ العَبْدُ يَعْمَلُ سَاعاتٍ طَوِيلَةً بِلا حُقُوقٍ.

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3927

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3927

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3927

q3_mismapped_sentence_words.label: censusA:#3927
